Spells-Sorcerer — Male Human Sorcerer: 10
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 19 (+4) Constitution: 9 (-1) Intelligence: 10 (+0) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 15 (+2)
Background: Noble Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: Celtic-Briantia (NG)
Experience: 77601/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Actor: +1 Charisma
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2 Selectable Feature Count: Sorcerer (Dragon Ancestor): 1; Sorcerer (Metamagic): 3; Sorcerer (Sorcerous Origin): 1
Feats: Actor; Charger Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Sorcerer Features: Draconic Bloodline; Draconic Resilience; Dragon Ancestor; Elemental Affinity; Font Of Magic; Gold Dragon; Heightened Spell; Metamagic; Quickened Spell; Save Proficiency (Constitution; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion); Sorcerous Origin; Spellcasting; Twinned Spell; Weapon Proficiency (Dagger; Dart; Sling; Quarterstaff; Light Crossbow) Noble Features: Language (Choose 1 from any); Position Of Privilege; Skill Proficiency (History; Persuasion); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Gaming Set)
Feature Notes:
Dragon Ancestor: 1 selection
Metamagic: 3 selections
Sorcerous Origin: 1 selection
Position Of Privilege: Receives welcome from the upper class and deference from commoners
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +4 Insight: (wis) +3 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +3 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +6
Arcana: (int) +4 Investigation: (int) +0 Religion: (int) +4
Athletics: (str) +3 Medicine: (wis) +3 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +0 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +4 Perception: (wis) +3 Survival: (wis) +3
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; History; Persuasion; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Three-Dragon Ante Set
Languages: Abyssal; Common; Draconic; Halfling
Skill Notes:
Draconic Bloodline: Language (Draconic)
Actor: Has advantage on Deception and Performance to impersonate another person and can mimic others' speech or sounds
Draconic Bloodline: +4 on proficient Charisma checks with dragons
Combat
Hit Points: 36 Initiative: +4 Armor Class: 17
Weapon Proficiency: Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Quarterstaff; Sling
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Dart (+8 1d4+4 P R20/60); Light Crossbow (+8 1d8+4 P R80/320); Quarterstaff (+7 1d6+3 B [2h d8]); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: -10
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +4
Draconic Resilience: +10 Hit Points/+3 Armor Class in no armor
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Charger: Can use a bonus action after a 10' Dash to attack (+5 damage) or to push 10'
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution
Save: Charisma: +6; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +4; Intelligence: +0; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +3
Save Notes: Elemental Affinity: Can spend 1 sorcery point to gain resistance to fire for 1 hr
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: S0: 6; S: 11 Spell Slots: S1: 4; S2: 3; S3: 3; S4: 3; S5: 2 Attack: S: +6 Spell DC: S: 14
Spells:
Acid Splash (S0 Conj): R60' Inflicts 2d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) on a single target or 2 adjacent targets
Alter Self (S2 Tran): Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains magic natural weapons with +8 attack and 1d6+4 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Animate Objects (S5 Tran): R120' 10 Tiny (20 hit points; Armor Class 15; +8 slam inflicts 1d4+4 HP bludgeoning) or Small (25 hit points; Armor Class 16; +6 slam inflicts 1d8+2 HP), 5 Medium (40 hit points; Armor Class 13; +5 slam inflicts 2d6+1 HP), 2 Large (50 hit points; Armor Class 10; +6 slam inflicts 2d10+2 HP), or 1 Huge (80 hit points; Armor Class 10; +8 slam inflicts 2d12+4 HP) objects obey mental commands when within 500' for concentration up to 1 min [+Level animates +2 objects]
Arcane Gate (S6 Conj): R10' Creates a portal pair that can teleport creatures 500' for concentration up to 10 min
Banishment (S4 Abju): R60' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blade Ward (S0 Abju): Self gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing weapon damage for 1 rd
Blight (S4 Necr): R30' Inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half; plant target has disadvantage on the save and suffers maximum damage on failure) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Blindness/Deafness (S2 Necr): R30' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blink (S3 Tran): Self has a 50% chance of becoming ethereal at the end each turn, returning to a choice of spot within 10' at the start of the next turn, for 1 min
Blur (S2 Illu): Foes suffer disadvantage when using sight to attack self for concentration up to 1 min
Burning Hands (S1 Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Chain Lightning (S6 Evoc): R150' Inflicts 10d8 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) on 4 targets in a 30' radius [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Person (S1 Ench): R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Chill Touch (S0 Necr): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP necrotic and target cannot regain hit points until the start of the next turn; undead also suffer disadvantage vs. self attack for 1 rd
Chromatic Orb (S1 Evoc): R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Circle Of Death (S6 Necr): R150' 60' radius inflicts 8d6 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +2d6 HP]
Clairvoyance (S3 Divi): R1 mile Self can choose each rd to see or hear via an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Cloud Of Daggers (S2 Conj): R60' 5' cube inflicts 4d4 HP slashing for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +2d4 HP]
Cloudkill (S5 Conj): R120' 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half) and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Color Spray (S1 Illu): 15' cone blinds 6d10 HP of targets for 1 rd [+Level affects +2d10 HP of targets]
Comprehend Languages (S1 Divi): Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Cone Of Cold (S5 Evoc): 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Confusion (S4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Counterspell (S3 Abju): R60' Negates foe casting up to spell level 3; successful DC 10 + spell level negates a higher-level spell [+Level negates any spell of equal or lesser level]
Creation (S5 Illu): R30' Creates a 5' cube of false matter lasting 1 day (vegetable matter), 12 hr (stone or crystal), 1 hr (precious metals), 10 min (gems), or 1 min (adamantine or mithral) [+Level creates a +5' cube]
Crown Of Madness (S2 Ench): R120' Self can direct the target's attacks each rd (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Dancing Lights (S0 Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per rd as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Darkness (S2 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkvision (S2 Tran): Willing touched sees 60' in darkness for 8 hr
Daylight (S3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Delayed Blast Fireball (S7 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 12d6 HP fire + 1d6 HP fire per rd delayed (save Dexterity half) within concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Detect Magic (S1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Thoughts (S2 Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends; additional contested Intelligence attempts each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 2' of rock, 2" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Dimension Door (S4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (S1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disintegrate (S6 Tran): R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force [+Level inflicts +3d6 HP]
Dispel Magic (S3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dominate Beast (S4 Ench): R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7]
Dominate Monster (S8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dominate Person (S5 Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Earthquake (S8 Evoc): R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Enhance Ability (S2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr; Constitution also gives 2d6 temporary HP, Strength doubles carrying capacity, and Dexterity negates damage from a 20' fall [+Level affects +1 target]
Enlarge/Reduce (S2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Etherealness (S7 Tran): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Expeditious Retreat (S1 Tran): Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Eyebite (S6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or sickened (disadvantage on attack and ability rolls) (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
False Life (S1 Necr): Self gains 1d4+4 temporary hit points for 1 hr [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Fear (S3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (S1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Finger Of Death (S7 Necr): R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Fire Bolt (S0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fire Storm (S7 Evoc): R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fireball (S3 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Fly (S3 Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Fog Cloud (S1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Friends (S0 Ench): Self gains advantage on Charisma checks with a non-hostile target for concentration up to 1 min; the target becomes hostile afterward
Gaseous Form (S3 Tran): Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to nonmagical damage, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr
Gate (S9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Globe Of Invulnerability (S6 Abju): 10' radius blocks spells of level 5 or lower for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the level of spells blocked by 1]
Greater Invisibility (S4 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Gust Of Wind (S2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to redirect the wind
Haste (S3 Tran): R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity, and an additional action each turn for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Hold Monster (S5 Ench): R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hold Person (S2 Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hypnotic Pattern (S3 Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Ice Storm (S4 Evoc): R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d8 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP bludgeoning]
Incendiary Cloud (S8 Conj): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), obscures, and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Insect Plague (S5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Invisibility (S2 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Jump (S1 Tran): Touched gains triple jump distance for 1 min
Knock (S2 Tran): R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min
Levitate (S2 Tran): R60' Target 500 lb object or creature rises 20' (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Light (S0 Evoc): Touched object emits a 20' bright light (save Dexterity negates) for 1 hr
Lightning Bolt (S3 Evoc): 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Mage Armor (S1 Abju): Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Hand (S0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Missile (S1 Evoc): R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each [+Level creates +1 dart]
Major Image (S3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 6]
Mass Suggestion (S6 Ench): R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or any ally ends the effects [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9]
Mending (S0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Message (S0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 3' of wood, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Meteor Swarm (S9 Evoc): R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Minor Illusion (S0 Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Mirror Image (S2 Illu): 3 duplicates with Armor Class 14 allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with an 11, 8, or 6 on a d20 while 1, 2, or 3 duplicates remain, for up to 1 min
Misty Step (S2 Conj): Teleports self 30'
Move Earth (S6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Phantasmal Force (S2 Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 1d6 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Plane Shift (S7 Conj): Target (save Charisma negates) or self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Poison Spray (S0 Conj): R10' Inflicts 2d12 HP poison (save Constitution negates)
Polymorph (S4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast (save Wisdom negates; shapechangers automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points
Power Word Kill (S9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others are unaffected
Power Word Stun (S8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others are unaffected
Prestidigitation (S0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prismatic Spray (S7 Evoc): 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 10d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Protection From Energy (S3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Ray Of Frost (S0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (S1 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned for 1 rd (save Constitution HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Reverse Gravity (S7 Tran): R100' Items in a 100'x100' cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Scorching Ray (S2 Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
See Invisibility (S2 Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
Seeming (S5 Illu): R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Shatter (S2 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; inorganic creatures have disadvantage) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Shield (S1 Abju): Cast as a reaction upon taking damage, gives self +5 Armor Class and immunity to Magic Missile until the start of the next turn
Shocking Grasp (S0 Evoc): Touch inflicts 2d8 HP lightning and loss of reactions until its next turn
Silent Image (S1 Illu): R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Sleep (S1 Ench): R90' 20' radius puts to sleep 5d8 hit points of creatures, starting with those with the least hit points, for 1 min (damage or shaking awakens) [+Level affects +2d8 hit points of creatures]
Sleet Storm (S3 Conj): R150' 40' radius obscures, douses exposed flames, and inflicts difficult terrain and prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (S3 Tran): R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action per turn, and a 50% chance of a 1-rd delay on spell effects (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Spider Climb (S2 Tran): Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr
Stinking Cloud (S3 Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stoneskin (S4 Abju): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Suggestion (S2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Sunbeam (S6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunburst (S8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness)
Telekinesis (S5 Tran): R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or 1000 lb object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Teleport (S7 Conj): R10' Teleports an unattended 10' cube object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleportation Circle (S5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 1 year makes it permanent
Thunderwave (S1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Time Stop (S9 Tran): Self can take 1d4+1 turns while no time passes for others; affecting another creature or moving more than 1000' away ends
Tongues (S3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
True Seeing (S6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight, sees magically concealed doors, and can see into the Ethereal Plane for 1 hr
True Strike (S0 Divi): R30' Self gains advantage on the next attack on the target within 1 rd
Wall Of Fire (S4 Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Stone (S5 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity avoids entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Water Breathing (S3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Walk (S3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Web (S2 Conj): R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Strength frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Wish (S9 Conj): Mimics an 8th level spell or alters reality with few limits; casting to alter reality reduces Strength to 3 for 2d4 days and causes later spellcasting before a long rest to inflict 1d10 HP necrotic per spell level
Witch Bolt (S1 Evoc): R30' Ranged spell inflicts 1d12 HP lightning per rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d12 HP initial]
Magic Notes:
Elemental Affinity: Spells that deal fire damage inflict +2 HP
Font Of Magic: Can use 10 sorcery points per long rest and can use a bonus action to convert between sorcery points and spell slots
Heightened Spell: Can spend 3 sorcery points to inflict disadvantage on a target's initial save vs. a self spell
Quickened Spell: Can spend 2 sorcery points to use a bonus action to cast a 1-action spell
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the sorcerer spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Twinned Spell: Can spend sorcery points equal to the level of a spell to add a second target
